recommended_action: System operating normally - no action required
Restart router to resolve possible network congestion
Run disk cleanup to remove temporary files and check for memory leaks in running applications
Check for background downloads causing disk and network load and reboot system if issues persist
Close unused applications to free RAM; reduce graphics settings in active applications
Disable browser extensions consuming memory and bandwidth and close high-memory GPU-intensive programs
Check for memory leaks in running applications and verify GPU cooling and clean fans
Reboot system to reset memory and disk processes and perform full system malware scan
Identify CPU-intensive background processes via Task Manager
Check for Windows updates consuming CPU and bandwidth
Upgrade system RAM to handle workload and disable unnecessary startup applications
Flush DNS cache to resolve latency under load and scan disk for errors using CHKDSK
Ensure power supply unit can handle CPU load and close rendering or encoding software not in use
Switch to wired connection for stable high-performance tasks and pause cloud synchronization services temporarily
Consider hardware upgrade for sustained multitasking; defragment hard drive to improve disk performance
Backup important data and consider professional servicing
